titles.text: Fire Emblem: Call of the Armor

descriptions.text: Fire Emblem: Call of the is a hackrom of Fire Emblem: The Sacred Stones. It was built in ~4 months by a team of 14 chapter creators, dubbed Team Distant Roads. The mod features 20 chapters w/ 3 Tear Ring Saga inspired character selection interludes. You can play with up to 65 units total, and 50 in any single run of the hack.
